              generic "Complete: { \"content\": \"Within the SPARTA technique EX-0010 (Malicious Code), CM0016 (CWE List) and CM0019 (Static Analysis) are directly related: CM0016 defines a prioritized list of system-specific software weakness classes (e.g., Common Weakness Enumerations) that are to be used during static code analysis for prioritization, while CM0019 performs static source code analysis looking for system-relevant weaknesses, explicitly referencing CM0016. Thus, CM0016 guides the scope and prioritization of CM0019, and together they help identify and mitigate malicious code vulnerabilities in spacecraft software before deployment. The QRA evidence confirms that CM0016 enhances resilience against EX-0010 by prioritizing weaknesses during static analysis, and CM0019 mitigates EX-0010 by analyzing code for those system-relevant weaknesses as specified in CM0016.\", \"citations\": [\"EX-0010\", \"CM0016\", \"CM0019\"], \"confidence\": \"high\", \"caveats\": [\"The evidence excerpts are truncated, but the definitions and QRA answers explicitly state the relationship; no contradictory information is present.\"] }" [e141] [cursor=pointer]
